heading_content_part: Our Privacy Policy for Slideshow MakerSlideshow Makerandroid app under developer name of Photos And Video Apps, respect and protect all user's personal privacy.  Slideshow Maker DO NOT use and disclose your

personal information. Except as otherwise provided in this privacy policy this information will not be disclosed or provided to third parties.  Slideshow Maker update this privacy policy from time to time. At the time you agree  Slideshow Maker service agreement, you are deemed to have agreed to all of the contents of this privacy policy.PERSONAL INFORMATION

Since no data transmitted over Internet or stored on Internet, users can be guaranteed to be absolutely secure. Slideshow Maker cannot ensure or warrant the security of any personally identifiable information you are transmitting to the websites or posting it on non-public (restricted or private) pages. You understand and acknowledge that the submission of any such information by you via the Internet or posting it on non-public (restricted or private) pages is at your own risk. To prevent unauthorised access, maintain data accuracy, and ensure the correct use of information, Slideshow Maker maintains appropriate physical, electronic, and procedural safeguards.

NON PERSONAL INFORMATIONWe may collect and use non-personal information in the following circumstances. To have a better understanding in user's behavior, solve problems in products and services, improve our products, services and advertising, we may collect non-personal information such as the data of install and uninstall, frequency of use, country, equipment and channel.

MODIFICATIONS TO APPLICATIONSlideshow Maker reserves the right to modify, suspend or discontinue, temporarily orpermanently, the Application or any service to which it connects, with or without notice and without liability to you.

heading_content_part: LINKS TO THIRD PARTY APPS OR WEBSITESSlideshow Maker may contain links to and from third party Apps of our business partners, advertisers, and social media sites. If you follow a link to any of these apps or websites, please note that these apps or websites have their own privacy policies and that we do not accept any responsibility or liability for their policies. Please check the individual policies before you submit any information to those apps or websites.
